meaning: n.箔,金属薄片,[建]叶形片,烘托,衬托vt.衬托,阻止,挡开,挫败,贴箔于
examples: Wrap the meat in foil before you cook it.
Foil wrapping paper is beautiful but difficult to use.
The pale walls provide a perfect foil for the furniture.
Don't let the sequester foil your trip to a national park or other site this summer.
They just want a constant foil, someone to blame when students flounder and the schools underperform.
